items.name: Artisan Cheese Selection
items.description: Sylvan Star Grizzly Gouda - Red Deer, Alberta One year aged Gouda. Strong firm texture while remaining smooth and creamy on the palate. Hints of nuts & caramel with a salty tang. Avonlea Clothbound Cheddar - Prince Edward Island Complex flavours with the aroma of fruit and toasted nuts. Firm texture with rich, full bodied flavors with a tangy bite at the end. Fromagerie du Presbytére Bleu d'Elizabeth - Warwick, Quebec This pasteurized cow's milk blue cheese is aromatic with a perfect salt balance. It is made in the style of a Roquefort. River Café Preserve, Pickles, House Made Flax Seed Crackers
